title: PRIMA STRONG PLASTIC RUST-FREE CLOTHES PEGS 36 PACK
features: Pegs Tough, durable and rust-free, these spring pegs are designed to withstand wet and windy conditions.
The Prima Clothes Pegs includes 36 pieces in assorted colours for hanging laundry and clothing around the home or with washing line.
Assorted Colours Strong Plastic Rust-Free Spring
